zh.lifeSummary: 當Simon de Montfort於1025年出生在法國i萊-德-福朗斯易維林斯蒙特福吉利曼利時，他的父親Count Amaury Seigneur De Montfort26歲，母親Bertrade de France25歲。他於大約1055年與Isabella de Broyes Basset結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1087年9月25日享年62歲，埋葬在法國艾-吉洛易艾白農。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Simon de Montfort于1025年出生在法国i萊-德-福朗斯易維林斯蒙特福吉利曼利时，他的父亲Count Amaury Seigneur De Montfort26岁，母亲Bertrade de France25岁。他于大约1055年与Isabella de Broyes Basset结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1087年9月25日享年62岁，埋葬在法国艾-吉洛易艾白農。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Montfort
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French and Breton: variant of   Monfort   1. This surname is most common in Brittany and Haute-Savoie. See also 2 below.
Altered form of Dutch Montfoort: habitational name from Montfoort in Utrecht. It is a cognate of 1 above (see Monfort 1) and also its altered form (or perhaps vice versa).
English (of Norman origin): very rare variant of   Mountford  , a cognate of 1 above.

variants.name: Monfort
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French/Haitian Jacques, Marcel, Monique, Wilner.

French and Breton: habitational name from any of numerous places called Montfort, from Old French mont ‘hill’ (see Mont 1) + fort ‘strong, impregnable’ (from Latin fortis). This surname is by far most common in Brittany. It is also found in Haiti. Compare Montfort 1, see also 2 below.
Altered form of Dutch Montfoort, a variant of Montfort 2 and also a cognate of the French name in 1 above and an altered form of its variant Montfort 1 (or perhaps vice versa).

variants.name: Monforte
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Angelo, Salvatore, Carmela, Carmine, Rocco, Rosaria, Sal.  Spanish Carlos, Francisco, Luis, Medardo.

Italian and Spanish: habitational name from any of numerous places called Monforte, from Latin mons ‘mountain’ (genitive montis) + fortis ‘strong’, probably a reference to the strategic position of these locations.
English (of Norman origin): variant of   Montfort  . This form of the surname is rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: Simon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Usual English form of Simeon , borne in the New Testament by various characters: two apostles, a brother of Jesus, a Pharisee, a leper, a tanner, a sorcerer (who offered money for the gifts of the Holy Ghost, giving rise to the term simony), and the man who carried Jesus's cross to the Crucifixion.

variants.name: Simen
meanings: Usual English form of Simeon , borne in the New Testament by various characters: two apostles, a brother of Jesus, a Pharisee, a leper, a tanner, a sorcerer (who offered money for the gifts of the Holy Ghost, giving rise to the term simony), and the man who carried Jesus's cross to the Crucifixion.

en.lifeSummary: When Simon de Montfort was born in 1025, in Montfort-l'Amaury, Yvelines, Île-de-France, France, his father, Count Amaury Seigneur De Montfort, was 26 and his mother, Bertrade de France, was 25. He married Isabella de Broyes Basset about 1055. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 25 September 1087, at the age of 62, and was buried in Épernon, Eure-et-Loir, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Simon de Montfort est né en 1025, à Montfort-l'Amaury, Yvelines, Île-de-France, France, son père, Count Amaury Seigneur De Montfort, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Bertrade de France, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Isabella de Broyes Basset environ 1055. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 25 septembre 1087, à l’âge de 62 ans, et a été enterré à Épernon, Eure-et-Loir, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Simon de Montfort 1025 in Montfort-l'Amaury, Yvelines, Île-de-France, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Count Amaury Seigneur De Montfort 26 und seine Mutter Bertrade de France 25. Er hat um 1055 Isabella de Broyes Basset geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 25. September 1087 im Alter von 62 Jahren und wurde in Épernon, Eure-et-Loir, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Simon de Montfort è nato il nel 1025 nel Montfort-l'Amaury, Yvelines, Île-de-France, Francia, il suo padre, Count Amaury Seigneur De Montfort, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Bertrade de France, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Isabella de Broyes Basset circa 1055. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 25 settembre 1087, all'età di 62 anni, e fu sepolto a Épernon, Eure-et-Loir, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Simon de Montfortが1025年にフランスiレ-デ-フランスイベラインスモントフォート-ル'アマアウリーで生まれた時，父Count Amaury Seigneur De Montfortは26歳，母Bertrade de Franceは25歳であった。約1055年にIsabella de Broyes Bassetと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1087年9月25日に62歳で死去し，フランスエウレ-エト-ロイルeペルノンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Simon de Montfort(이)가 1025년 프랑스 i레-데-프랜스 이벨라이네스 몽포트-'아모리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Count Amaury Seigneur De Montfort(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Bertrade de France(은)는 25세였다. 그는 대략 1055년 Isabella de Broyes Basset(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1087년 9월 25일 62세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 우레-트-로이르 e퍼넌에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Simon de Montfort nasceu em 1025, em Montfort-l'Amaury, Yvelines, Île-de-France, França, seu pai, Count Amaury Seigneur De Montfort, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Bertrade de France, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Isabella de Broyes Basset aproximadamente 1055. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 25 de setembro de 1087, com 62 anos, e foi sepultado em Épernon, Eure-et-Loir, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Simon de Montfort родился в 1025 г. в местности монтфорт-л'амаури, ивелаинесь, iле-де-фрэнс, Франция, его отцу по имени Count Amaury Seigneur De Montfort было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Bertrade de France, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabella de Broyes Basset около 1055 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 25 сентября 1087 г. в возрасте 62 лет и был похоронен в местности eпирнон, эуре-ет-лоир, Франция.

sm.Between 1053 and 1087: mai le 1053 e o'o I le 1087

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Simon de Montfort nació en 1025, en Montfort-l'Amaury, Yvelines, Île-de-France, Francia, su papá, Count Amaury Seigneur De Montfort, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Bertrade de France, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Isabella de Broyes Basset aproximadamente 1055. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 25 de septiembre de 1087, a la edad de 62 años, y fue sepultado en Épernon, Eure-et-Loir, Francia.
